title: euonymus verrucosus f. pauciflorus
intro: Euonymus verrucosus f. pauciflorus, also known as the spiny spindle or Euonymus pauciflorus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It is a variant of the Euonymus verrucosus species, characterized by fewer flowers. Euonymus verrucosus f. pauciflorus has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and improving digestion.
